summary: BTC Tools | Pipeline Input Configs | View and Edit Pipeline Input Configs
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "BTC Tools" tile from the homepage
Then the user should land on the "Schedule" page
And the user should see tabs for "Schedule", "Configs", "CDN Status", "Broadcast Source Overrides" and "Team Zixi Sources"
When the user clicks on the "Pipeline Input" tab
Then the user should see the "Pipeline Input Configs" page
And the user should see the following for every card within the Pipeline Input Configs grid: Team Logo | Venue | Venue ID
When the user clicks on the "PNC Park" Venue within the grid
Then the user should see the input config dialog open from the right
And the user should see the following for every row within the input configs table:
Id | Feed Type Code | Input Label | Cam 4 Input Label | Category
When the user clicks on the "Edit" button for the "HD" feed type row within the input configs table
Then the user should see the "Edit Config" dialog
When the user enters "PIT Home PG" into the "Input Label" field within the Edit Config Dialog
And the user enters "MLBN TVE C-Net" into the "Cam 4 Input Label" field within the Edit Config Dialog
And the user selects the "NON_GAME" category dropdown option
And the user clicks on the "Save" button within the Edit Config Dialog
Then the user should not see the "Edit Config" dialog
When the user refreshes the page
And the user clicks on the "PNC Park" Venue within the grid
Then the user should see "PIT Home PG" in the "Input Label" field for the "HD" feed type row
And the user should see "MLBN TVE C-Net" in the "Cam 4 Input Label" field for the "HD" feed type row

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "BTC Tools" tile from the homepage
steps.result:
*Then* the user should land on the "Schedule" page

*And* the user should see tabs for "Schedule", "Configs", "CDN Status", "Broadcast Source Overrides" and "Team Zixi Sources"

steps.result:

*And* the user should see the following for every row within the input configs table:
Id | Feed Type Code | Input Label | Cam 4 Input Label | Category

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Edit" button for the "HD" feed type row within the input configs table
steps.result: *Then* the user should see the "Edit Config" dialog

steps.action:
*When* the user enters "PIT Home PG" into the "Input Label" field within the Edit Config Dialog

*And* the user enters "MLBN TVE C-Net" into the "Cam 4 Input Label" field within the Edit Config Dialog

*And* the user selects the "NON_GAME" category dropdown option

*And* the user clicks on the "Save" button within the Edit Config Dialog
steps.result: *Then* the user should not see the "Edit Config" dialog

steps.action:
*When* the user refreshes the page

*And* the user clicks on the "PNC Park" Venue within the grid
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see "PIT Home PG" in the "Input Label" field for the "HD" feed type row

*And* the user should see "MLBN TVE C-Net" in the "Cam 4 Input Label" field for the "HD" feed type row
